# Configuration Promotion Automation

> AI agents should consult [Docs for Agents](https://developer.pingidentity.com/build-with-ai/docs-for-agents.md)
> for guidance on navigating Ping Identity documentation.

## Config Automation Promotion

- [Auditing and Reviewing Changes](https://developer.pingidentity.com/config-automation-promotion/concepts/auditing_and_reviewing_changes.md): Review and audit configuration changes before deployment to validate compliance and catch unverified changes in Ping Identity solutions
- [Configuration as Code (CaC)](https://developer.pingidentity.com/config-automation-promotion/concepts/configuration_as_code.md): Manage Ping Identity solution configuration as code, covering export guardrails and validation practices such as syntax checking and linting
- [Configuration Automation Concepts](https://developer.pingidentity.com/config-automation-promotion/concepts/overview.md): Learn foundational concepts for automating configuration promotion across Ping Identity solutions using CI/CD and GitOps practices
- [Configuration Promotion at Ping Identity](https://developer.pingidentity.com/config-automation-promotion/configuration_promotion_landing_page.md): Learn how to automate configuration promotion for Ping Identity solutions using GitOps, Terraform, and the Ping CLI command-line tool
- [GitOps Pipeline Examples](https://developer.pingidentity.com/config-automation-promotion/configuration_promotion_pipeline_examples.md): Find example GitOps CI/CD pipeline templates for promoting Ping Identity platform, application, and infrastructure configuration
- [Promoting and Deploying Configuration](https://developer.pingidentity.com/config-automation-promotion/concepts/promoting_and_deploying_configuration.md): Automate deployment of approved configuration changes to pre-production and production environments for Ping Identity solutions
- [Testing Automation](https://developer.pingidentity.com/config-automation-promotion/concepts/automated_testing.md): Apply unit and integration testing practices to validate configuration changes for Ping Identity solutions in CI pipelines
- [Verifying Deployed Configuration](https://developer.pingidentity.com/config-automation-promotion/concepts/verifying_deployed_configuration.md): Detect configuration drift in deployed Ping Identity solutions using automated verification methods such as Terraform plan and API checks
